title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on the street in concrete jungle】

jazz funk.rare groove.acid jazz

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "The Phantom – Bubbha Thomas and The Lightmen Plus One" into "Pearl (Among The Swine) – The Bobby Hamilton Quintet Unlimited".

Enjoy the haunting groove that gradually heats up, from the dubious spiritual jazz texture to the funky soul jazz that involves electric piano and vibraphone.

今回は「THE PHANTOM - BUBBHA THOMAS AND THE LIGHTMEN PLUS ONE」から「Pearl (Among The Swine) · The Bobby Hamilton Quintet Unlimited」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
怪しげなスピリチュアル・ジャズの質感からエレピとヴィブラフォンが絡むファンキーなソウル・ジャズへ、耳に残るグルーヴがじわりと熱を帯びていく繋ぎをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQq7p8pyv2E
